title: Allay Drumsticks
description: Adds drumsticks as a drop to Allays
body:
# Allay Drumsticks

Tiny mod adding drumsticks to Allays as a good source of food if at all farmable. 
Has a 50% chance to drop the drumstick

---
👉 Github: https://github.com/Erbium08/AllayDrumsticks

👉 CurseForge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/allay-drumsticks

---

For Fabric
- 1.20.1
- 1.21.1
